description: Sent to the submitter when a decision (GO/HOLD/KILL) is made on their idea
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] Decision on Your Idea — {{idea_name}}
body:
Decision on Your Idea

Dear {{submitter_name}},

A decision has been made on your idea "{{idea_name}}" following the validation review.

Decision:

{{decision}}

Idea{{idea_name}}
Business Unit{{business_unit}}

The SaaS Factory team will be in touch with next steps. If you have questions about this decision, please reach out to the team directly.

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

You are receiving this because you submitted this idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
